commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=2f2fb6f62beb3ac3de872cecabcebc11962df90c)
commands.review_summary:
This PR starts the first Control UI Gateway WebSocket connect in parallel with bootstrap, reprioritizes post-hello startup work, and adds connect-phase timing events with tests.

PR surface: Source +192, Tests +256. Total +448 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: with host.controlUiBootstrapReady pending, the chat refresh helper awaits it while the deferred lower-priority block is queued immediately. I did not run the PR’s tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - The PR is a protected maintainer draft with a concrete code-review finding; maintainer update/review is the right next step rather than an automatic cleanup close.

target.title: perf(control-ui): prioritize first connect startup
target.body:
Summary
- Start the first Control UI Gateway websocket connect without waiting for the HTTP bootstrap config fetch.
- Put chat startup refresh ahead of lower-priority hello work like bootstrap refresh, assistant identity, health, push reconciliation, and update verification.
- Add safe `control-ui.connect` phase timing events for socket open, challenge/fallback, device identity, connect request, hello, and failure without logging auth or nonce material.

Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner ui/src/ui/gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/control-ui-performance.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway-chat-load.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-lifecycle-connect.node.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.test.ui.json --pretty false --noEmit`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json ui/src/ui/app-gateway.ts ui/src/ui/app-lifecycle.ts ui/src/ui/control-ui-performance.ts ui/src/ui/gateway.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway-chat-load.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-lifecycle-connect.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/control-ui-performance.test.ts ui/src/ui/gateway.node.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.ui-e2e.config.ts --configLoader runner ui/src/ui/e2e/chat-flow.e2e.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
